limitations: The user's research question requires variables for sex, age, e-cigarette use, and epilepsy; the provided accessible hint centered on a BRFSS 2015 diabetes-indicators mirror, which is a reduced feature set not designed for this question.
In this run, I could not retrieve a usable dataset file from the hinted GitHub raw endpoints, so no empirical estimate or association model could be executed honestly.
The other hinted datasets (MAST, DANDI, NCI GDC) are unrelated to population prevalence of e-cigarette use in women under 50 and are not suitable substitutes for this epidemiologic question.
Without a dataset containing both e-cigarette use and epilepsy variables in the target subgroup, any claimed prevalence or linkage result would be unsupported.
methods: I inspected the user-provided dataset hints and attempted a reproducible retrieval from the explicitly suggested BRFSS 2015 GitHub mirror source using direct raw CSV URLs consistent with the hint. I also evaluated the scope of the hinted datasets conceptually against the research question. The retrievable hinted BRFSS mirror is a diabetes health indicators extract rather than a full tobacco/neurology survey file, so it is not expected to contain e-cigarette-use or epilepsy variables. I attempted direct download of likely raw GitHub CSV endpoints for the hinted BRFSS 2015 diabetes indicators file and confirmed that no usable study dataset was obtained in this run. Because no source among the provided hints exposed both e-cigarette use and epilepsy measures for women under 50 in an accessible, analyzable file during this run, I did not fabricate an analysis and returned no substantive empirical results.
research_question: Can the provided datasets support an empirical estimate of e-cigarette use prevalence among women younger than 50 years, and can they test an association between e-cigarette use and epilepsy in that subgroup?

sources.label: Suggested BRFSS 2015 diabetes health indicators GitHub raw CSV endpoint (attempted retrieval)
sources.notes: Attempted because it matched the dataset hint. Retrieval did not yield a usable file in this run.

sources.label: Alternative likely GitHub raw CSV endpoint for BRFSS 2015 diabetes indicators (attempted retrieval)
sources.notes: Attempted as a fallback based on search results referencing the same derived BRFSS diabetes file. Retrieval did not yield a usable file in this run.

title: E-cigarette use in women under age 50 and links with epilepsy
